prompt: Add HTML to PDF conversion support

turns.content:
<task>
Add HTML to PDF conversion to the document generator. Create a converter that takes HTML string and produces PDF bytes.
</task>

1	class DocumentGenerator:
   2	    def generate_text_pdf(self, text: str) -> bytes:
   3	        # Stub — returns empty bytes
   4	        return b''

arguments.query: python convert HTML to PDF lightweight library no wkhtmltopdf

turns.content:
1. weasyprint - Python HTML/CSS to PDF converter
   pip install weasyprint
   Usage: weasyprint.HTML(string=html_string).write_pdf()

2. xhtml2pdf - Pure Python HTML to PDF
   pip install xhtml2pdf
   Usage: from xhtml2pdf import pisa; pisa.CreatePDF(html, dest=output)

3. pdfkit - wkhtmltopdf wrapper (requires system binary)

arguments.summary: Read pdfgen/generator.py — DocumentGenerator stub. Found xhtml2pdf as a pure Python option (no system deps). Will add html_to_pdf() method using xhtml2pdf.pisa.

next_steps.description: Add html_to_pdf() method to DocumentGenerator using xhtml2pdf
